Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport

package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava
     
    io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting
     
    io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session
     
    io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire
     
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractStreamTransport
    Shared skeleton for all stream-oriented Transport implementations (TCP, TLS).
    AbstractTransport
    Lifecycle skeleton shared by every Transport implementation, regardless of whether the underlying protocol is stream-oriented (TCP, TLS) or message-oriented (WebSocket).
    StreamFramer
    Stream-transport framing helpers for Zenoh 1.x over stream-oriented links (TCP, TLS, WSS).
    TcpTransport
    Plain-TCP implementation of Transport for the Zenoh 1.x publisher.
    TlsConfig
    Immutable TLS configuration for TlsTransport.
    TlsConfig.Builder
     
    TlsTransport
    TLS + optional mTLS implementation of Transport for the Zenoh 1.x publisher.
    Transport
    Minimal transport SPI for the publisher.
    TransportException
    Checked exception for transport-layer failures (connect refused, read timeout, malformed stream framing, oversized frame, remote close).
    WsTransport
    WebSocket implementation of Transport for the Zenoh 1.x publisher, backed by the JDK's built-in WebSocket (JDK 11+).

Rebuilt from commit 2d2e383 at 2026-07-12 15:42 UTC
